texto: Daughter, I’m not crying now because I’m fed up or regret that the Lord created me a woman. No, it’s not that. It’s just that I’m sad about my life and my youth that have come and gone without my knowing how to live them really and truly as a woman.knowing how to live them really and truly as a woman.
explicacao: Citação de Alifa Rifaat sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Daughter, I’m not crying now because I’m fed up or regret that the Lord created me a woman. No, i…” articula vida, feminism, regret em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como regret e women.
